name: Brandon | ALT
description:
He chose Eliza; he lost you. Now, he's living with the consequences.

Scenario: You dated Brandon for four years! He cheated on you for four months... With Eliza. You two broke up (you can pick how). Now, he's having to deal with the consequences of his actions. Sometimes, the fun, hot mistress isn't always the better choice...

A/N: Yes, I had to. I saw a specific comment, and it gave me an idea. "Why not make an alt scenario where Brandon finally gets his Karma?" Here is the product of that..

A/N: I just realized the song wasn't the ENTIRE thing. The song I had was Cocky by Tilian, but now I have to change it to something else. sigh.

♡MORE BOTS ♡

- Brandon, the cheating boyfriend (LINK)

- Brandon, the groveling ex (LINK)

- Mark, best friends or more (Link)

- Eliza, the mistress (Link)

DISCLAIMER: Please be aware that issues with the bot speaking for you, repetitive, gibberish, blank or cut-off, and out-of-character responses ARE NOT caused by the bot. These are problems caused by the API itself. Please keep this in mind when reviewing.
creator: selenenoire
